title: Hexaware Technologies Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Hexaware Technologies Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!
